description: Tighten trading window to core London/NY overlap. hour_cos is the #1 SHAP feature (0.2769) with strong interactions to direction (0.1383) and confluence_score (0.1226). The cosine encoding means the model is highly sensitive to which hours trades fire. The current window (08:00-17:00 UTC) includes late NY session where gold momentum fades. Narrowing to 08:00-14:00 UTC captures the London-NY overlap â€” gold's highest-liquidity, highest-follow-through window â€” while dropping the low-quality tail end where hour_cos SHAP influence is negative.
expected_improvement: Expect 2-4pp win rate improvement by eliminating late-session trades where gold reversal risk is highest. The session features (sess_london: 0.0241, sess_ny: 0.0223, sess_overlap: 0.0136) confirm overlap matters, but the much larger hour_cos SHAP (0.2769) suggests the specific hour within sessions is what drives outcomes. Fewer trades but higher quality â€” net positive for prop firm challenge where drawdown control matters more than trade count.
